name: xtyle-markdown-default
title: Xtyle Markdown (default)
description: The built-in fill for the xtyle Markdown component: the mod-zero markup and behavior every app inherits and may override.

markers.data-body: Where the rendered markdown lands. The element replaces its children wholesale on every render; anything a fill puts inside it is transient.
markers.data-chrome: The container the edit chrome is built into, on mount, and only when `editable` — so a component that is not editable carries no source box at all. A fill owns everything inside it and may leave it empty.
markers.data-editor: The source textarea, built into `data-chrome` when `editable`. Its value is markdown and the element seeds it; a fill may restyle or relocate it but must keep it a form control that raises `input`.
markers.data-controls: The chrome bar around the switch.
